parameters.query: SELECT value, expires_at FROM public.utpl_config WHERE key = 'altiva_token'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ grant_type: 'client_credentials', client_id: $items('CONFIG INICIAL UTPL', 0, 0)[0].json.cfg.altiva.clientId, client_secret: $items('CONFIG INICIAL UTPL', 0, 0)[0].json.cfg.altiva.clientSecret }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const t = String($json.data?.access_token || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const ex = Number($json.data?.expires_in || 86400); const exp = new Date(Date.now() + ex * 1000).toISOString(); return `INSERT INTO public.utpl_config (key, value, expires_at, updated_at) VALUES ('altiva_token', '${t}', '${exp}', now()) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = '${t}', expires_at = '${exp}', updated_at = now()`; })() }}
